description_long: This figure depicts a humanoid character dressed in a full-body suit styled after Sonic the Hedgehog, with exaggerated blue spikes on the head and a tan patch on the chest. The face is exposed, revealing a skull-like visage, which gives the character a surreal or unsettling appearance. The suit covers the entire body, including gloves on the hands and pointed shoes reminiscent of classic cartoon or video game characters. The character is posed in a dynamic running motion, with one leg forward and arms bent at the elbows. The shoes are stylized with a pointed toe and a distinct heel, adding to the character's animated look. The overall form is slender and athletic, with proportions similar to an adult human.
description: A humanoid figure in a blue, spiked bodysuit with a skull-like face, posed in a running motion and wearing stylized gloves and pointed shoes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue spiked head, bent arms, and the full length of the bodysuit with the character in a running pose.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the skull-like face, tan chest patch, and both arms and legs in a dynamic running position.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the spiked head, profile of the skull face, and the pointed shoes in mid-stride.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the spiked head, the suit's fit, and the character's running posture from behind.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body character costume with gloves and pointed shoes
attribute_posture: running with arms bent and one leg forward
